Video.title: Emerald Waters

Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: Bob paints a brook in a colorful landscape.

Video.title: Meadow Brook

Video.summary: Firs front rugged peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Exhibition

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Winter

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin at Trail's End

Video.title: Wilderness Cabin

Video.title: Florida's Glory

Video.title: By the Sea

Video.title: Little Home in the Meadow

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry mountain scene.

Video.title: Frozen Solitude

Video.summary: Bob paints a restful scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Peaceful Haven

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain View

Video.summary: Bare trees darken an isolated creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Creek

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene lake and distant hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rolling Hills

Video.summary: A cowboy restin' by the vibrant golden red glow of the cracklin' flames.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Campfire

Video.summary: The stillness of a cold darkness is captured as a cozy little cabin rests atop a snow covered hill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Night

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil beach scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rowboat on the Beach

Video.summary: Fading light shrouds a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a calm mountain lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mirrored Images

Video.summary: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Distant Hills

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert site within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Glow

Video.summary: Bob paints a rocky mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lone Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints an autumnal valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pretty Autumn Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a stormy lighthouse scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Night Light

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin in frigid mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Teton Winter

Video.summary: Beneath a soft purple mountain range, an abundance of trees and bushes envelop a secret little lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints tall, smooth falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Graceful Waterfall

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a pond amid dense foliage.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wayside Pond

Video.summary: The sounds of quiet waters, the sight of velvety green shrubs and the hint of distance foothills in a perfect scene of relaxation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Inlet

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Back-Country Path

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter landscape within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Icy Lake

Video.summary: An old worn-down farm building settles into soft golden grassy bushes and trees of autumn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rustic Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Covered Bridge

Video.summary: Bob paints sky, stream and snowy peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Gray Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning
